creator: drr.backup@gmail.com
text: It appears that libreoffice 24.8.2.1 is using VCL plugin 'gen' by default, resulting in the 'x11' UI. Setting VCL plugin to 'qt5' brings the qt/plasma theme back. For me, this seems to also resolve the issue of core dump on exit. Not sure why this version is using 'gen' as default when previous versions used 'qt5'.
